overall.description: A first-person perspective walkthrough of a dark, narrow underground corridor extensively covered in graffiti and tags. The footage appears to be from a horror video game, featuring atmospheric low lighting, brick walls, and threatening painted messages as the player moves cautiously through the enclosed space.

events.description: fluorescent light fixture becomes visible on the left wall ahead

agents.ego_description: cautiously walking forward through the narrow corridor, observing the heavily tagged walls

entered.detail: brick wall completely covered in colorful tags and spray paint
brick wall covered in overlapping graffiti layers
single horizontal fluorescent tube mounted on the left wall providing dim illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, dimly lit underground corridor with walls completely covered in graffiti. The camera moves forward slowly, revealing more of the tagged brick walls and scattered debris on the concrete floor. A fluorescent light fixture becomes visible ahead on the left wall, casting a warm amber glow on the scene.

events.description: approaching and passing through wooden plank barricade blocking the corridor

agents.ego_description: squeezing through the wooden plank barrier that blocks the narrow passage

entered.detail: rough wooden planks nailed across the corridor forming a partial barrier with gaps

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a makeshift wooden barricade blocking the corridor. The walls remain covered in dense graffiti. The player character passes through the gaps in the wooden planks, moving from the dimly lit section into an even darker passage beyond, leaving the fluorescent light behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark corridor with threatening graffiti text

events.description: large painted text 'YOU LOST' becomes visible on the wall ahead
approaching a left turn in the corridor

agents.ego_description: moving through the darker passage toward the painted message, preparing to turn left

entered.detail: large white painted text reading 'YOU LOST' on the brick wall ahead

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the darker section of the corridor, large white painted text reading 'YOU LOST' becomes visible on the wall ahead. The camera continues forward through the narrow passage, passing the message as it approaches a left turn. The walls remain covered in dense graffiti tags and the floor is littered with debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: brick corridor with reduced graffiti coverage

events.description: fluorescent light fixture becomes visible again on the left wall
right wall transitions from graffiti-covered to exposed brick

agents.ego_description: turning left into a corridor section with exposed brick walls and new graffiti messages

entered.detail: red brick wall with minimal graffiti, showing mostly exposed brick texture
fluorescent tube light illuminating the corridor section

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left into a new corridor section where the right wall transitions to exposed red brick with minimal graffiti. A fluorescent light fixture is visible on the left wall, providing artificial illumination. The left wall continues to display graffiti including threatening text, while the camera moves steadily forward through the passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic underground corridor that shifts from amber-lit graffiti tunnels into a darker, more threatening passage. It begins by gliding forward past tagged brick walls and scattered debris, guided by the warm glow of a fluorescent light fixture on the left. As the camera approaches a makeshift wooden barricade, it pushes through the gaps in the planks, leaving the light behind and descending into a deeper, darker section of the corridor. The scene then reveals large white text reading YOU LOST painted on the wall before the camera continues forward and makes a sharp left turn. Finally, the environment shifts as the right wall transitions to exposed red brick with minimal tagging, while a new fluorescent light illuminates further threatening messages on the left.
